summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. Security-sensitive PRs are quarantined with route_security. Non-security open PRs are kept open as independent or related work because the shard has no shared canonical and merge/fix actions are blocked. Already closed PR #81911 is kept closed.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive PR is out of scope for ProjectClownfish mutation.

Related to the hydrated bare /new and /reset regression family, but not closable or mergeable in this plan-only inventory shard.
